title: Grimoire · Dialogue Craft
description: Extraction schema for dialogue-craft.md. Fields map to **Label:** fill-ins, tables, and checkbox groups in the template. Mark fields with x-source-required: true when the value should cite a source passage.

_source_text.description: Metadata about the source text being analyzed (fill in when using this template for book analysis).

enum: Advance plot (new information, decision, turning point)
Every line serves at least two functions?
Characters sound distinct from each other?
Subtext present (characters not saying exactly what they mean)?
Pacing appropriate (short lines for tension, longer for reflection)?
Dialect (if any) conveyed through word choice, not phonetic spelling?
Information conveyed through disagreement/partial knowledge, not lecture?
